mapper.insert:
select doc_seq.nextval from dual
insert into draft_documents values (#{doc_seq}, #{title}, #{doc_type}, #{users_id}, #{status}, null, #{is_temp}, null, sysdate, null)
insert into approval_lines values (line_seq.nextval, #{doc_seq}, #{users_id}, #{step_order}, #{status}, null, null)

select pay_seq.nextval from dual
insert into payment values (#{pay_seq}, #{doc_seq}, #{pay_date}, #{total_amount}, #{pay_reason}, #{account_info})

select purchase_seq.nextval from dual
insert into purchase values (#{purchase_seq}, #{doc_seq}, #{total_amount}, #{purpose}, #{vendor}, #{purchase_date})
mapper.select: select d.doc_seq as "doc_seq", d.title as "title", d.doc_type as "doc_type", d.users_id as "users_id", d.status as "status", d.reject_reason as "reject_reason", d.is_temp as "is_temp", d.temp_expires_at as "temp_expires_at", d.created_at as "created_at", d.updated_at as "updated_at", u.name as "name", u.users_seq as "users_seq", dept.dept_name as "dept_name", r.rank_name as "rank_name" from draft_documents d left outer join users u on d.users_id = u.id left outer join departments dept on u.dept_seq = dept.dept_seq left outer join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where d.doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select a.line_seq as "line_seq", a.doc_seq as "doc_seq", a.users_id as "users_id", a.step_order as "step_order", a.status as "status", a.handle_at as "handle_at", a.reject_reason as "reject_reason", u.name as "name", r.rank_name as "rank_name" from approval_lines a join users u on a.users_id = u.id join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where a.doc_seq = #{doc_seq} order by a.step_order

select a.cc_seq as "cc_seq", a.doc_seq as "doc_seq", a.users_id as "users_id", u.name as "name", d.dept_name as "dept_name" from approval_cc a join users u on a.users_id = u.id join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq where a.doc_seq = #{doc_seq} order by a.cc_seq

select vac_seq as "vac_seq", doc_seq as "doc_seq", vac_type as "vac_type", start_date as "start_date", end_date as "end_date", days as "days", reason as "reason" from vacation where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select pay_seq as "pay_seq", doc_seq as "doc_seq", pay_date as "pay_date", total_amount as "total_amount", pay_reason as "pay_reason", account_info as "account_info" from payment where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select purchase_seq as "purchase_seq", doc_seq as "doc_seq", total_amount as "total_amount", purpose as "purpose", vendor as "vendor", purchase_date as "purchase_date" from purchase where doc_seq = #{doc_seq}

select item_seq as "item_seq", pay_seq as "pay_seq", item_order as "item_order", item_name as "item_name", amount as "amount", note as "note", sysname as "sysname", oriname as "oriname" from payment_items where pay_seq = #{pay_seq} order by item_order

select item_seq as "item_seq", purchase_seq as "purchase_seq", item_order as "item_order", item_name as "item_name", ea as "ea", unit_price as "unit_price", total_price as "total_price", note as "note" from purchase_items where purchase_seq = #{purchase_seq} order by item_order

select attachment_seq as "attachment_seq", purchase_seq as "purchase_seq", oriname as "oriname", sysname as "sysname", created_at as "created_at" from purchase_attachments where purchase_seq = #{purchase_seq} order by attachment_seq
select d.*, u.name as name from draft_documents d inner join users u on d.users_id = u.id inner join approval_cc c on d.doc_seq = c.doc_seq where c.users_id = #{loginId} order by d.created_at desc

select a.line_seq, a.doc_seq, a.users_id, a.step_order, a.status, a.handle_at, a.reject_reason, u.name as name, r.rank_name as rank_name, u.sysname as sysname
from approval_lines a inner join users u on a.users_id = u.id inner join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where a.doc_seq = #{doc_seq} order by a.step_order
